short_summary: War ongoing, Iran deal distracts West
rationale: For Ukraine, the war continues at maximum background; the Iran deal momentum and Trump's diplomatic focus on Iran risk diverting Western attention and resources from Ukraine's defense needs.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' in Iran deal; Hormuz reopening signal
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy focused on Iran deal risks reducing attention and political capital available for Ukraine support. No direct aid cut announced, but the diversion risk is real and ongoing.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues across Ukrainian territory with no ceasefire or qualitative change this cycle. Daily life remains under threat of strikes and mobilization.

top_events.title: Israel hits south Lebanon, displacement orders issued
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military action in Lebanon keeps Middle East conflict active, further competing with Ukraine for Western media and policy attention.
